Vans RV-7 - G-RVII - Experimental / EASA Annex II, White Waltham

Aircraft Type: Single Engine Fixed Wing
Year: 2017
Make: Vans Aircraft
Model: RV-7
Reg Number: G-RVII
Airframe Hours: 412
Engine Make: Lycoming O-360-A1A
Engine Hours: 412 (from new, 2017 build)
Prop Make: Whirl Wind 200RV composite 2-blade
ARC: LAA Permit to Fly, valid to October 2025

Price: £62,500

Avionics:
- Dynon SkyView HDX 10" (primary EFIS)
- Dynon SkyView 7" (co-pilot display)
- Dynon SkyView autopilot (roll and pitch servos, altitude hold, nav tracking)
- Garmin GTR 225 VHF comm
- Garmin GTX 45R ADS-B Out (1090ES)
- GRT Mini AHRS backup

Full glass cockpit, VFR-based build. No ILS receiver, no VOR installed. GPS moving map only.

Experimental EASA Annex II (LAA Permit to Fly). Not EASA type-certificated. VFR day operations. Built by current owner from Vans kit over 7 years.

Based at White Waltham Airfield (EGLM). Hangared. Single owner (original builder).

Notes: Beautifully finished RV-7 with full Dynon SkyView glass and autopilot. Lightweight, fast, economical. Note: permit aircraft, VFR day only — no IFR approval. No scheduled maintenance programme.
